_doc: Provenance for every visual asset on the site. All photos in this manifest are real, scraped from @goldycardetailing IG (public) on 2026-05-25. Originals saved in _source/ig/ with full caption + size metadata in _source/ig/_provenance.json.
_scrape_notes: 27 unique photos pulled from public profile grid (logged-out, no API). IG cuts off infinite scroll for logged-out users at ~27 posts of her 84 total.
